name: Oauth Settings
doc_structure: [{"element":"input","data":{"label":"Config Name","name":"name","type":"text","required":1,"unique":1,"set_only_time":1,"in_list_view":1,"searchable":1,"key":"oa_name","id":"oa_name"}},{"element":"select","data":{"label":"Provider","name":"provider","options":"google\ngithub","required":1,"unique":1,"in_list_view":1,"key":"oa_provider","id":"oa_provider"}},{"element":"row","data":{"name":"oa_row_creds","id":"oa_row_creds","label":"Credentials","layout":"[50,50]"},"elements":[{"element":"col","data":{"name":"oa_col_cid","id":"oa_col_cid","label":"Col1"},"elements":[{"element":"input","data":{"label":"Client ID","name":"client_id","type":"text","key":"oa_cid","id":"oa_cid"}}]},{"element":"col","data":{"name":"oa_col_csec","id":"oa_col_csec","label":"Col2"},"elements":[{"element":"input","data":{"label":"Client Secret","name":"client_secret","type":"text","key":"oa_csec","id":"oa_csec"}}]}]},{"element":"input","data":{"label":"Scopes (optional, space or comma separated)","name":"scopes","type":"text","key":"oa_scopes","id":"oa_scopes"}},{"element":"row","data":{"name":"oa_row_flags","id":"oa_row_flags","label":"Flags","layout":"[50,50]"},"elements":[{"element":"col","data":{"name":"oa_col_en","id":"oa_col_en","label":"Col1"},"elements":[{"element":"switch","data":{"label":"Enabled","name":"enabled","in_list_view":1,"key":"oa_enabled","id":"oa_enabled"}}]},{"element":"col","data":{"name":"oa_col_su","id":"oa_col_su","label":"Col2"},"elements":[{"element":"switch","data":{"label":"Allow signup (create user on first verified login)","name":"allow_signup","key":"oa_signup","id":"oa_signup"}}]}]}]
